text:
record represents a hospitalization for a beneficiary in the calendar year (CY). Beneficiaries with multiple hospitalizations will have multiple records in this file.
Beneficiaries can be linked to other beneficiary data via the BENE_ID and to plan information via the HEDIS_CONTRACT_ID and HEDIS_PLAN_ID variables.

Program: 
Medicare
Category: 
Beneficiary Enrollment and Summary, Plan and Provider
Privacy Level:
